steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between sea palm and bull kelp — specifically that bull kelp has a more intense umami flavor than sea palm. The correct choice must contrast the two.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Some types of brown seaweed, like sea palm and bull kelp, trigger umami flavor in human taste buds.: Does not contrast the two seaweeds — fails to show bull kelp's umami is more intense. ✗
  • Choice B — Sea palm is a type of brown seaweed, but so is bull kelp.: Describes a similarity rather than a difference in umami intensity. ✗
  • Choice C — While sea palm and bull kelp contain umami flavor, umami can also be found in tuna and blue cheese.: Focuses on a factor other than umami intensity. ✗
  • Choice D — After tasting two types of brown seaweed, sea palm and bull kelp, participants in a study found bull kelp's umami flavor to be the more intense of the two.: Directly contrasts sea palm's moderate umami with bull kelp's higher umami intensity. ✓
That is the correct answer.
